Headline: #70 Division Temporary Westbound Reroute near Division/Kolmar
ShortDescription: Westbound 70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted, due to a flooded viaduct near Division/Kolmar.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted via Division, Kostner, Augusta, Cicero and Division, over regular route, to a flooded viaduct near Division/Kolmar.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: # 53 Pulaski Temporary Northbound Reroute near Pulaski & Victoria
ShortDescription: Northbound 53 buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, Bryn Mawr, Kimball, Peterson, Pulaski, over regular route near Pulaski & Victoria.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, Bryn Mawr, Kimball, Peterson, Pulaski, over regular route near Pulaski & Victoria. 

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
